narrative:
Lawrence Twp. township has 1,666 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.0 percentage points.
